translations.es: Hoy vamos a ver el terreno.
translations.it: Oggi andiamo a vedere il terreno.
translations.he: היום אנחנו הולכים לראות את השטח.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi đi xem mảnh đất.
translations.nl: We gaan vandaag het stuk grond bekijken.
translations.hi: आज हम जमीन देखने जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα πάμε να δούμε το οικόπεδο.
translations.nb: Vi skal se på tomta i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini kami melihat lahan itu.
translations.da: Vi skal se på grunden i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は土地を見に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural, nominative; functions as the subject.
Finite verb; present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive verb agreeing with 'Wir'.

Temporal adverb; modifies the verb phrase, indicating time.

sentences.target: Das Grundstück liegt direkt am Wald.

translations.de: Das Grundstück liegt direkt am Wald.
translations.en: The property is right by the forest.
translations.es: El terreno está justo al lado del bosque.
translations.fr: Le terrain est juste à côté de la forêt.
translations.it: Il terreno è proprio vicino al bosco.
translations.pt: O terreno fica bem ao lado da floresta.
translations.vi: Mảnh đất nằm ngay cạnh khu rừng.
translations.ar: قطعة الأرض تقع مباشرة بجانب الغابة.
translations.nl: Het stuk grond ligt vlak bij het bos.
translations.hu: A telek közvetlenül az erdő mellett van.
translations.hi: यह जमीन जंगल के बिलकुल पास है.
translations.el: Το οικόπεδο είναι ακριβώς δίπλα στο δάσος.
translations.id: Lahan itu berada tepat di samping hutan.
translations.ja: 土地は森のすぐそばにあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; neuter singular nominative; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; neuter, singular; serves as the subject.
Finite verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive verb describing location.
Adverb of degree/manner; intensifies the locative relation.
Preposition (contraction of 'an dem'); governs dative; introduces the PP specifying location.
Common noun; masculine, singular; object of the preposition 'am' in dative, part of the locative PP.

sentences.target: Ich kaufe das Grundstück nächstes Jahr.

translations.de: Ich kaufe das Grundstück nächstes Jahr.
translations.en: I’m buying the property next year.
translations.es: El año que viene voy a comprar el terreno.
translations.ru: Я куплю участок в следующем году.
translations.pt: Vou comprar o terreno no ano que vem.
translations.he: אני קונה את השטח בשנה הבאה.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ mua mảnh đất vào năm sau.
translations.nl: Ik koop het stuk grond volgend jaar.
translations.hi: मैं यह जमीन अगले साल खरीदूँगा.
translations.el: Θα αγοράσω το οικόπεδο του χρόνου.
translations.id: Saya akan membeli lahan itu tahun depan.
translations.ja: 来年その土地を買います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb.
Definite article; neuter singular accusative; marks the direct object NP.
Common noun; neuter, singular; head of the accusative NP; direct object of 'kaufe'.
Attributive adjective; neuter singular accusative; agrees with 'Jahr' in the temporal accusative phrase.
Common noun; neuter, singular; temporal accusative functioning as an adverbial ('next year').

sentences.target: Neben dem Grundstück steht unser kleines Haus.
sentences.reading: /ˈneːbən deːm ˈɡʁʊnʃtʏk ʃteːt ˈʊnzɐ ˈklaɪ̯nəs haʊs/

translations.de: Neben dem Grundstück steht unser kleines Haus.
translations.ipa: /ˈneːbən deːm ˈɡʁʊnʃtʏk ʃteːt ˈʊnzɐ ˈklaɪ̯nəs haʊs/
translations.en: Next to the property stands our small house.
translations.es: Nuestra casa pequeña está al lado del terreno.
translations.fr: Notre petite maison est à côté du terrain.
translations.it: La nostra piccola casa è accanto al terreno.
translations.ko: 땅 옆에 우리 작은 집이 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这块地旁边是我们的小房子。
translations.yue: 塊地旁邊有我哋嘅細屋。
translations.ru: Рядом с участком стоит наш маленький дом.
translations.pt: Nossa casa pequena fica ao lado do terreno.
translations.he: ליד השטח עומד הבית הקטן שלנו.
translations.vi: Ngôi nhà nhỏ của chúng tôi ở cạnh mảnh đất.
translations.ar: بجانب قطعة الأرض يقع بيتنا الصغير.
translations.nl: Naast het stuk grond staat ons kleine huis.
translations.uk: Поряд із ділянкою стоїть наш маленький будинок.
translations.hu: A telek mellett áll a kis házunk.
translations.hi: जमीन के पास हमारा छोटा घर है.
translations.pl: Obok działki stoi nasz mały dom.
translations.el: Δίπλα στο οικόπεδο βρίσκεται το μικρό μας σπίτι.
translations.nb: Ved siden av tomta står det lille huset vårt.
translations.id: Di sebelah lahan itu ada rumah kecil kami.
translations.sv: Bredvid tomten står vårt lilla hus.
translations.ro: Lângă teren se află casa noastră mică.
translations.cs: Vedle pozemku stojí náš malý dům.
translations.da: Ved siden af grunden står vores lille hus.
translations.fi: Tontin vieressä on meidän pieni talomme.
translations.ja: 土地の隣に私たちの小さな家があります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article; dative singular (neuter here); required by 'neben'.
Common noun; neuter, singular; object of the preposition 'neben' in dative.
Finite verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive; main verb; verb-first order after fronted PP.
Possessive determiner; modifies the noun phrase; agrees with 'Haus' (neuter nominative singular); uninflected here with following adjective carrying inflection.
Attributive adjective; nominative neuter singular; agrees with 'Haus'.
Common noun; neuter, singular; grammatical subject of 'steht' (placed after the verb due to fronted PP).
